title: dendranthema rupestre
intro: Dendranthema rupestre, also known as the Alpine Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Dendranthema rupestre are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
